Meet the speakers! - EUDTP 2025 - EuroTech Universities Alliance
snippet: Lists Fabio Giglietto as a Professor of Internet Studies at University of Urbino Carlo Bo, researches disinformation dynamics, examining how false narratives spread across digital platforms and their societal impact. His studies analyze computational methods for detecting coordinated manipulation campaigns. As a professor his work provides critical insights into the mechanisms of media manipulation, offering evidence-based approaches to identify and counter harmful information operations.
description: This webpage from EuroTech Universities Alliance introduces Fabio Giglietto as a speaker at the EUDTP 2025 conference, highlighting his expertise in disinformation dynamics and computational methods for detecting manipulation campaigns.

title: DIGITAL SOCIAL NETWORK ANALYSIS - Lecturer: Fabio Giglietto - A.Y. 2025/2026 - Uniurb
snippet: This page describes the course 'Digital Social Network Analysis' taught by Fabio Giglietto at the University of Urbino. It outlines the course's objectives, which include understanding methodologies for analyzing digital social environments, collecting data from the web and social media, and exploring datasets using R and Gephi software.
description: This webpage from the University of Urbino describes the course 'Digital Social Network Analysis' taught by Fabio Giglietto, focusing on methodologies for analyzing digital social environments and using tools like R and Gephi.

title: Giornata Internazionale di Studi - Can the Damage of Destructive Polarization Be Repaired?
snippet: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a presenter (with Giada Marino and Bruna Almeida Paroni) from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo, presenting on "The Brazilian Digital Battlefield: Investigating The Dynamics Of Political Information Campaigns In Post-Bolsonaro Era". The study investigates the dynamics of misinformation campaigns on Facebook in the context of Brazil's political shifts, focusing on the period from the 2022 elections to the aftermath of the attempted coup on January 8, 2023.
description: Fabio Giglietto is presenting at the "Giornata Internazionale di Studi" on the dynamics of political information campaigns on Facebook in post-Bolsonaro Brazil, focusing on misinformation from the 2022 elections to the aftermath of January 8, 2023.

title: Who is behind vera.ai? Meet the people and teams that make up the vera.ai project. #8 Team of University of Urbino Carlo Bo
snippet: Interview with Fabio Giglietto as the leader of the Uniurb team within the vera.ai project. Discusses the team's role in discovering problematic content and addressing coordinated sharing behavior. Also touches on challenges and trends in disinformation analysis.
description: This is an interview with Fabio Giglietto discussing his work leading the University of Urbino Carlo Bo team on the vera.ai project, which focuses on detecting problematic content and coordinated sharing behavior.
